Stroke - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
STRK_MEDICAID_EVER Stroke - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
BRC_COMBINED Breast Cancer - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
BRC_MEDICARE Breast Cancer - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
